headline: Eastman Chemical: An Iran War Beneficiary
summary: Eastman Chemical remains a "Buy" as Middle East supply disruptions tighten markets and lift prices. Here's what investors need to know about EMN stock.

headline: 3 Dividend Stocks With Yields Up To 4.3 For Your Portfolio
summary: In the last week, the United States market has stayed flat, yet it is up 28% over the past year with earnings forecast to grow by 16% annually. In this environment, dividend stocks with attractive yields can offer a compelling opportunity for investors seeking income and stability in their portfolios.
